title: Vehicle
description: Minimal representation of a single vehicle as exposed by inventory.search results. The same shape is the base type for inventory.vehicle responses (VehicleDetail), which freely allows additional dealer-specific properties. Carried inside the typed AAP response payload (`inventory.search.response` and `inventory.vehicle.response`) which itself rides inside an A2A `Message.parts[].data` DataPart.

dealer_id.description: Stable identifier of the dealer that owns this listing.

vehicle_id.description: Optional dealer-internal identifier when the vehicle is not yet VIN-decoded (e.g. an in-transit unit).

stock.description: Dealer's stock number for this unit.

make.description: Vehicle make / manufacturer brand (e.g. Honda, BMW, Ford).

model.description: Vehicle model name (e.g. CR-V, 3 Series, F-150).

trim.description: Trim level (e.g. EX-L, M Sport, Lariat).

interior_color.description: Free-text interior color or upholstery name.

condition.description: Sale condition. 'certified' implies a manufacturer-backed certified pre-owned program.

description.description: Optional human-readable description / dealer notes for marketing copy.

engine.description: Engine description (e.g. '2.0L Turbo I4', '3.5L V6 Hybrid').

mpg.description: Fuel economy estimates. Omit for fully electric vehicles or use 'electric_range_mi' instead.

electric_range_mi.description: Estimated electric range in miles, for BEV and PHEV vehicles.

list_price.description: Dealer's advertised list price; the base price of the vehicle BEFORE incentives, taxes, or fees.

offered_price.description: Regional price equal to list_price plus applicable taxes for the buyer's zip_code, when the dealer enables desking. Present only if a zip_code is supplied AND the dealer supports desking.

price.description: FTC-emphasized FINAL out-the-door price after all incentives, mandatory fees, and required add-ons. Per FTC enforcement (2026 dealership warnings + CARS Rule), this field MUST reflect the total amount the buyer would pay; advertising a 'price' that excludes required fees, conditions on dealer financing, or omits required add-ons is a violation.

zip_code.description: Buyer ZIP/postal code used to compute regional pricing fields (offered_price). Optional; when absent, regional pricing fields MUST be omitted.

photos.description: Public URLs of vehicle photos, ordered by relevance.

vdp_url.description: Public Vehicle Detail Page (VDP) URL on the dealer's website.

status.description: Free-text availability status (e.g. 'In Stock', 'In Transit', 'Pending', 'Sold', 'Reserved'). Spec recommends but does not enforce a controlled vocabulary.

last_verified_at.description: Timestamp at which the dealer last verified availability/price/status of this listing. REQUIRED when the agent makes availability claims.
